home.title: OpenTrade
home.tagline: Bringing fairness back to financial-service reviews — on chain.

brokers.title: HK licensed brokers
brokers.subtitle: Browse all SFC-licensed brokers in Hong Kong and read authentic user reviews.
brokers.disclaimer: Listings are sourced from the SFC public register. This does not constitute investment advice.

brokerDetail.noReviews: No reviews yet — be the first to leave one.
brokerDetail.disclaimer: All reviews are immutable once anchored on chain. The platform will never delete reviews for any reason.

reviewForm.title: Write a review
reviewForm.loginRequired: Please log in to write a review.
reviewForm.titlePlaceholder: Summarise your experience in one sentence
reviewForm.bodyPlaceholder: Describe your experience in detail (at least 10 characters)
reviewForm.successMessage: Your review is being anchored on chain. Once confirmed, it cannot be deleted or modified.

settings.title: Account settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your display name, language preference, and account information.
settings.loginRequired: Please log in to view settings.

verify.title: Verify your broker account
verify.subtitle: Submit proof of your brokerage relationship to earn L2 Verified Reviewer status and receive your on-chain SBT.
verify.loginRequired: Please log in to begin verification.
verify.alreadyVerified: You are already a verified reviewer.
verify.pendingMessage: Your verification request is under admin review. You will be notified once approved.
verify.brokerSlugPlaceholder: Select the broker you have an account with
verify.evidenceHint: Upload your broker statement to IPFS first, then paste the CID here.
verify.commitmentHint: A keccak256 hash computed locally. Your raw data never leaves your device.
verify.successMessage: Your request has been queued for admin review. Once approved, your Reviewer SBT will be minted automatically.

steps.title: How it works
steps.step1Desc: Upload your broker account statement to IPFS (encrypted).
steps.step2Desc: A keccak256 hash is generated locally — your data never leaves your browser.
steps.step3Desc: An admin verifies your evidence. Your raw data is never stored on our servers.
steps.step4Desc: Once approved, your Reviewer SBT is minted on-chain. Non-transferable, forever yours.

verify.disclaimer: This process does not constitute account verification by the broker itself. OpenTrade verifies your relationship with the broker, not your investment decisions.

status.title: API and dependency health check
status.subtitle: Live health of the OpenTrade API and the services it depends on. This page also exercises the apps/web ↔ apps/api wire end to end.

errors.unreachableHint: The Next.js server could not fetch a health response from the OpenTrade API. Confirm apps/api is running and that NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL is set correctly.

status.disclaimer: This page reports operational status only and does not constitute investment advice.
